visual_description: Five men are seated around a large table in an office with glass partitions; one stands at the head of the table facing them. The standing man gestures slightly with his hands while speaking, and the seated men look toward him, some with pens in hand and papers in front of them. A television screen displays a video feed in the background, and a police cap rests on the table.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone with a moderate pace and pitch, accompanied by occasional breathing sounds.
